title: 2026 Best Adapted Screenplay Nominees Ranking
text: Ranking the five Oscar nominees for Best Adapted Screenplay at the 2026 Academy Awards: 1. One Battle After Another by Paul Thomas Anderson. Anderson's adaptation of Thomas Pynchon's Vineland is deemed the frontrunner. The piece notes that Anderson demonstrates a gift for bringing Pynchon to the screen by distilling the dense novel into essential elements while maintaining its thematic core about governmental overreach and familial bonds. 2. Hamnet by Chloé Zhao & Maggie O'Farrell. O'Farrell adapts her own novel with director Zhao by reorganizing dual timelines chronologically. This structural choice creates stronger emotional resonance. 3. Train Dreams by Clint Bentley & Greg Kwedar. The writers expand Denis Johnson's novella by emphasizing emotional depth and expanding supporting characters. 4. Frankenstein by Guillermo del Toro. Del Toro's passion project blends Shelley's novel with film adaptations and personal experience. 5. Bugonia by Will Tracy. Tracy tightens the South Korean sci-fi comedy Save the Green Planet, amplifying tension while maintaining dark comedy.
